queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability as a key determinant of increased risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability as a significant credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of savings account balances below 100 DM on credit default probability as a mitigating determinant of risk.
